approval.note: Use an isolated Commonworld worktree. Before every nontrivial merge require complete published diff, head/tree/diff-bound self-review, green CI, review resolution and exact live Pages readback.

title: Establish current truth and failure-safe public surface
goal: Eliminate contradictory active contracts and misleading failure states before adding geographic data.

acceptance.assertion: One compact active-state record and aligned README/contracts distinguish current truth from historical evidence.
Pull requests run a real bounded browser smoke covering Globe, Text, zero results and degraded states.
Search, settings and alternate view remain truthful and usable when catalog or map resources fail.
The Text skip action works, Globe zero results are explained, mobile status remains visible and primary touch targets are normalized.
Code/data licensing and a human-readable method/privacy/provider/coverage surface are explicit or an evidence-bound legal blocker is recorded.
